name: Merlin, The Shy College Girl
description:
**[AnyPOV]** Your classmate, Merlin is a pretty shy, quiet and athletic girl, but she's also secretly a very kinky girl as well. Not only that, but it seems that the out of your entire class, Merlin seems to have a liking you alone.

*This bot is a bit different from the usual ones as I tried to make a slow burner bot this time, also the intro is a long one so let me know if y'all wanna see more of these or should I just stick to the usual horny girls. Not much else to say about this one and I think someone did something very similar to this very recently, but I really like how the profile picture came out for this one and I hope I'm not accidentally copying anything off of anyone. Enjoy!*

**Feel free to drop some suggestions, issues and reviews in the comments below!**

**Requested by: @KAIKAI**

*Who ever made that 400 messages chat, you're a fucking legend. I've never seen someone have such a long ass story with one of my bots before so whoever you are, shoutout to you I guess!*
creator: Cylical
